response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with 15+ years of full-stack experience and current, genuinely relevant work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience only began in April 2025 (~1 year). There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or Python — most of the required qualifications — and his customer-facing work is teaching/workshop oriented rather than enterprise technical discovery. He falls well short of the staff-level GenAI delivery profile this role demands.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) and agentic-workflow tooling experience in his current role
15+ years of broad production engineering with strong TypeScript/Node.js, AWS CDK, and Kubernetes exposure
Proven mentorship and communication skills via workshops, conference talks, and open-source project leadership
concerns: Roughly 1 year of AI-related experience versus the required 8+ years building production AI solutions
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience
Python is absent from his skill set, and enterprise customer-facing discovery leadership is not evidenced

key_factors.factor: Insufficient years of production AI experience
Missing RAG, vector database, and Python qualifications
